_instructions: CONTENT TYPES — add one entry per artwork:
type:'image'  → photo/digital art (.jpg or .png) placed in images/
type:'video'  → MP4 clip placed in videos/ (plays muted in the gallery)
type:'text'   → artist statement; put the text in 'content', no file needed
All types share: id, name, student, year, description.
Gallery auto-positions everything — no coordinates needed.

entries.name: Ergonomic Pencil Holder
entries.description: A user-centred pencil holder designed for left-handed users, featuring a weighted base and angled slots.

entries.name: Urban Geometry
entries.description: Digital photography exploring repeating patterns in city architecture.

entries.name: Design Process Reel
entries.description: A one-minute walkthrough of the full design cycle from brief to prototype.

entries.name: Artist Statement
entries.content: My work explores how everyday objects can be redesigned to reduce friction for users with limited dexterity. I approached each iteration by testing with real users and letting their feedback drive every decision.
